title: How to make customed my own templates with 2 boards together

posts.author: kevin_jun (kevin jun)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Experts,
We are trying to set up the company standard template with 3 boards connected all together. And I need to get them( 3 boards) downloaded at the same time by just one click whenever users want to do.

Currently I can see only save template one by one and downloaded one by one.
Is there any good way to make it nice bundled templates?

Regards Kevin
